Torrhen Stark
Allegiance House Stark
Culture northmen
Born 153–208 AC[1]

Book The World of Ice & Fire (mentioned)

Torrhen Stark was a member of House Stark. He was the elder brother of his twin Cregard, and the eldest son of Edric Stark and Serena Stark.[2][N 1]
